inputs.prompt: /no_think Theme: __THEME__. Return minified JSON only, no prose, no markdown. Keys: project, style_preset, clips. clips must be an array with exactly 8 objects. Each clip object must include id, route, video_prompt, negative_prompt, image_prompt, duration_seconds, audio. Set route=wan22_t2v and duration_seconds=5.0 for every clip. video_prompt must include explicit camera movement (dolly/orbit/crane/push/pull/locked-pan), subject movement, environment movement. audio must include speakers[1]{id,text,voice}, ambient[1]{type}, music{mood,volume_db}, sfx[1]{type}. Write speaker text in German and keep it devotional, concrete and emotional.
